title: 有馬記念の後に・冥冥之志

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf might have forfeited the Triple
Crown, but she can still win something just as
valuable: the shield of the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her spirits are high as she looks to her next race,
but they turn to concern when she sees Air
Groove, who seems exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that she is the reason Air Groove has
been running herself ragged, Symboli Rudolf
resolves not to skimp on her presidential duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the year comes to an end, it seems that the
pair's desire to lighten one another's burdens is
preventing them from seeing eye to eye.
